jobs.prompt: 16:9 educational editorial illustration of a complex vector space, showing real and imaginary axes, elegant vectors from a common origin, subtle coordinate grids, abstract complex geometry suggesting two real dimensions per complex dimension. One main idea: complex linear structure with Re/Im decomposition. Warm paper background, deep ink outlines, dusty blue, terracotta, sage and muted violet accents, generous whitespace, premium academic style. No readable text, no formulas, no digits, no fake axis labels, no decorative clutter.
